title: A Tight Squeeze
lines: You flick on the heavy-duty flashlight. The beam cuts through the darkness.
Just a few feet ahead of you, the tunnel is completely choked with massive, sticky spider webs.
You saved your own life. You carefully step back.
On the ground near the edge of the webs, you spot an unopened, vacuum-sealed block of cheese.

options.desc: Pick up the block of cheese
Go back to the start of the tunnels
